timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Congress declares independence day
description: Indian National Congress marks complete independence as a political objective.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Salt tax campaign announced
description: Mahatma Gandhi informs the viceroy that salt law protest will begin.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Letter sent to Irwin
description: Gandhi sends final warning before civil disobedience.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: March begins
description: Gandhi and volunteers leave Sabarmati Ashram.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: First village halt
description: Marchers begin daily village meetings.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Crowds expand
description: Public support increases along route.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Women join mobilization
description: Women organize local salt protests.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: International press arrives
description: Foreign correspondents begin regular coverage.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Volunteer pledges grow
description: More satyagrahis register for arrests.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Merchants donate supplies
description: Local traders support the march.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Salt law speeches intensify
description: Gandhi frames salt as universal grievance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Approach to coast
description: March enters final coastal phase.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Arrival at Dandi
description: Marchers reach the Arabian Sea.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Salt law broken
description: Gandhi lifts natural salt in symbolic defiance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Salt raids spread
description: Local communities evaporate seawater for salt.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Chittagong raid echoes unrest
description: Parallel anti-colonial action broadens pressure.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Gandhi arrested
description: Colonial authorities detain Gandhi before Dharasana action.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Dharasana raid
description: Volunteers face beatings at salt works.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Prisoners released
description: Negotiations reopen after months of arrests.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Salt March
timeline_description: Chronology of the Salt March and related civil disobedience campaign in India.
title: Gandhi-Irwin Pact signed
description: Civil disobedience pauses under political agreement.
